subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the Truth is verily the Dawning-Place of the signs of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لمشرق ایات الله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
